# @aegis/sdk (TypeScript) — generated, do not edit

Typed TypeScript client (npm workspace) generated from `ontology/aegis.yaml` +
the API surface (Phase 3, spec 08 §8). The Phase 4 investigation workspace
(`ui/`) is built exclusively on this SDK — ontology-driven screens, no raw
HTTP. `tsc --noEmit` and the drift gate run in CI.
